title: Collagen Coating for Tissue Culture
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"snuy2","text":"This protocol is intended for collagen coating of tissue culture dishes and Transwell® multiple well plates.  The attached methods document is a formal version of the information included here.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":85,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"brwdl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fauvm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6fyo3","text":"Disclaimer: The information presented here has been reviewed and approved for publication by the US Environ do not necessarily represent Agency policy. Mention of trade names or commercial products does not constitute endorsement or recommendations for use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"hyh97","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

tips (low retention)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"imh1q","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dilute PureCol ® collagen (3.0 mg/mL) to 50 µg/mL (1:60) in cell culture grade water in a sterile 50 mL conical tube or appropriately sized bottle. NOTE : PureCol collagen needs to be kept on ice.
Swirl contents gently, but thoroughly, until material is completely mixed.
Add appropriate amount of the mixture to the tissue culture dish, well, or insert in the following volumes and swirl to ensure the entire surface is coated:
Tissue culture dishes (i) 7 mL per 100mm dish (ii) 15 mL per 150mm dish
6 well plates (i) 1.0 mL per 24mm insert (ii) 1.5 mL per well
12 well plates (i) 250 µL per 12mm insert (ii) 750 µL per well
Replace the dish lid and incubate in a biosafety cabinet (or another covered, dry location) at room temperature for 2 hours.
Rinse coated surfaces with the following volumes of sterile PBS:
Tissue culture dishes -7 mL per 100mm dish -15 mL per 150mm dish
6 well plates -1.0 mL per 24mm insert -1.5 mL per well
12 well plates -250 µL per 12mm insert -750 µL per well
Carefully aspirate the wash. Allow residual wash to pool by tilting the plates to facilitate aspirating as much of the wash as possible.
Air dry dishes and plates in biosafety cabinet, laid out flat with the lids cracked slightly open.
Label with the date in green permanent marker. Repackage dishes and plates in their original bags and store in plastic bins at 4°C.
creator: Protocols Importer
